Marcella Hazan was an Italian cooking teacher and author widely credited with
introducing authentic Italian home cooking to English-speaking readers. Her
approach was direct and uncompromising — she believed in understanding why a
technique worked, not just following instructions.

Her Bolognese recipe, with its long reduction and addition of milk, remains one
of the most referenced versions in English-language cooking.
